description_long: This object is a whimsical loaf of bread with the face of a Shiba Inu dog seamlessly blended into one end, creating a playful and surreal visual effect. The loaf has a golden-brown, lightly dusted crust that mimics the appearance of freshly baked bread, with subtle flour marks and a slightly domed top. The Shiba Inu's face is highly detailed, featuring expressive eyes, a black nose, and pointed ears, all integrated into the bread's surface. The sides of the loaf are straight and the ends are slightly rounded, giving it a classic rectangular bread shape. The overall texture of the crust appears soft and slightly rough, typical of a homemade loaf. There are no visible slices, packaging, or branding on the object.
description: A golden-brown loaf of bread with a realistic Shiba Inu dog face integrated into one end, featuring a soft, flour-dusted crust and playful details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Shiba Inu face clearly on the left side of the loaf, with the bread's golden crust and flour dusting visible.
description_view_1: The side view displays the narrow profile of the loaf, with no visible facial features or crust details.
description_view_2: The rear view again shows the Shiba Inu face, now on the right side, with the loaf's crust and flour pattern visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view presents the same narrow profile as view 1, with no facial or crust details visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is golden-brown with a light dusting of flour and a slightly uneven, rustic texture. There are no visible scores, seeds, or other decorative markings.
